## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/workflow update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant tests/build locally
- [ ] I verified workflow impact
- [ ] I updated docs/examples when needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not include unrelated changes
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] Linked issue(s): #

## Notes

Additional details for reviewers.
